channel.title: 学习经验 on Liyu's Page
channel.description: Recent content in 学习经验 on Liyu's Page

item.title: CSAPP第二章笔记
item.description: //2.61 /* A. !~x B. !x C. ! ~(x |0xFF) 0xFF -> 00 00 00 FF 0xFF because unsure about the bits of x D. int shift_amount = (sizeof(int)-1)<<3; //to get the number of bits from the highest to the lowest displacement of the int type data int xright = x>>shift_amount; int xmask = xright&0xff; //All bits are 0 if they comply with the request return !
